suite.name: Test

test.name: Validate HTML Table Matches Parquet Data

kw.name: Get File Url
kw.doc: Convert an absolute or relative file path to a file:// URL.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Read Html Table
kw.msg: ${html_df} = facility_type visit_date average_time_spent 0 Specialty Center 2026-04-16 27.00 1 Hospital 2026-04-16 52.00 2 Clinic 2026-04-16 ...
kw.doc: Read Plotly table trace from a Selenium WebElement into a pandas DataFrame.

kw.name: Rename Dataframe Columns
kw.msg: ${html_df} = facility_type visit_date avg_time_spent 0 Specialty Center 2026-04-16 27.00 1 Hospital 2026-04-16 52.00 2 Clinic 2026-04-16 22.00 3 ...
kw.doc: Return a copy of df with columns renamed according to column_mapping.

kw.name: Read Parquet Data
kw.msg: ${parquet_df} = facility_type visit_date avg_time_spent 0 Clinic 2026-04-11 48.00 1 Specialty Center 2026-04-13 52.33 2 Specialty Center 2026-04-11 34.00 3 Spec...
kw.doc: Read a partitioned Parquet dataset with optional date filtering.

kw.name: Compare Dataframes
kw.doc: Compare two DataFrames for an exact match after normalising types and sort order.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Data mismatch between HTML table and Parquet dataset:\n${diff}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Read Html Pie Chart
kw.msg: ${html_pie_df} = facility_type min_avg_time_spent 0 Clinic 22.0 1 Hospital 23.0 2 Specialty Center 27.0
kw.doc: Read Plotly pie trace from a Selenium WebElement into a pandas DataFrame.

kw.name: Compute Min Avg By Group
kw.msg: ${parquet_pie_df} = facility_type min_avg_time_spent 0 Clinic 22.0 1 Hospital 23.0 2 Specialty Center 27.0
kw.doc: Return a DataFrame with the minimum value per group.

kw.name: Compare Dataframes
kw.doc: Compare two DataFrames for an exact match after normalising types and sort order.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Pie chart mismatch between HTML and Parquet:\n${pie_diff}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

test.doc: Opens the HTML report in Chrome, reads the Plotly table into a DataFrame, reads the Parquet dataset filtered by 2026-04-16, and asserts that both DataFrames are identical.

suite.doc: Validates that the HTML report table matches the Parquet dataset. Test passes when data is identical; fails with a diff when mismatches exist.
